heading: Morning Chanting
title: 01. First utterance of the Buddha
content:
Anekajātisaṃsāraṃ, sandhāvissaṃ anibbisaṃ;

Gahakāraṃ gavesanto, dukkhā jāti punappunaṃ.

Gahakāraka diṭṭhosi, puna gehaṃ na kāhasi;

Sabbā te phāsukā bhaggā, gahakūṭaṃ visaṅkhitaṃ;

Visaṅkhāragataṃ cittaṃ, taṇhānaṃ khayamajjhagā”ti.

heading: Morning Chanting
title: 02. Paṭiccasamuppāda:
content:
Iti imasmiṃ sati idaṃ hoti, imassuppādā idaṃ uppajjati.|

imasmiṃ asati idaṃ na hoti, imassa nirodhā idaṃ nirujjhati.|

yadidaṃ Avijjāpaccayā saṅkhārā, saṅkhārapaccayā viññāṇaṃ, viññāṇapaccayā nāmarūpaṃ, nāmarūpapaccayā saḷāyatanaṃ, saḷāyatanapaccayā phasso, phassapaccayā vedanā, vedanāpaccayā taṇhā, taṇhāpaccayā upādānaṃ, upādānapaccayā bhavo, bhavapaccayā jāti, jātipaccayā jarāmaraṇaṃ sokaparidevadukkhadomanassupāyāsā sambhavanti.

evametassa kevalassa dukkhakkhandhassa samudayo hoti.

“Avijjāyatveva asesavirāganirodhā saṅkhāranirodho, saṅkhāranirodhā viññāṇanirodho, viññāṇanirodhā nāmarūpanirodho, nāmarūpanirodhā saḷāyatananirodho, saḷāyatananirodhā phassanirodho, phassanirodhā vedanānirodho, vedanānirodhā taṇhānirodho, taṇhānirodhā upādānanirodho, upādānanirodhā bhavanirodho, bhavanirodhā jātinirodho, jātinirodhā jarāmaraṇaṃ sokaparidevadukkhadomanassupāyāsā nirujjhanti – evametassa kevalassa dukkhakkhandhassa nirodho hotī’ti.

Yadā have pātubhavanti dhammā;

ātāpino jhāyato brāhmaṇassa;

athassa kaṅkhā vapayanti sabbā;

yato pajānāti sahetudhammaṃ.

Yadā have pātubhavanti dhammā;

ātāpino jhāyato brāhmaṇassa;

athassa kaṅkhā vapayanti sabbā;

yato khayaṃ paccayānaṃ avedī.

Yadā have pātubhavanti dhammā;

ātāpino jhāyato brāhmaṇassa;

vidhūpayaṃ tiṭṭhati mārasenaṃ;

suriyova obhāsayamantalikkhaṃ.

Namo tassa bhagavato arahato sammāsambuddhassa!!!

Namo tassa bhagavato arahato sammāsambuddhassa!!!

Namo tassa bhagavato arahato sammāsambuddhassa!!!

heading: Morning Chanting
title: 03. Invitation
content:
yāvatā bhagavā loke - tiṭṭheyya tava sāsanaṃ;

tāvatā patigaṇhātu - pūjā lokānukampayā.

heading: Morning Chanting
title: 04. Oil Lamp Offering
content:
gandhatelappa dittena - dīpena tama dhaṃsinā;

tilokadīpaṃ sambuddhaṃ - pūjayāmī tamonudaṃ.

Sitthatelappadittena - dīpena tamadhaṃsinā;

tilokadīpaṃ sambuddhaṃ - pūjayāmī tamonudaṃ.

heading: Morning Chanting
title: 05. Incense Offering
content:
sugandhikāyavadanaṃ - anantaguṇagandhinaṃ;

sugandhinā’haṃ gandhena - pūjayāmī tathāgataṃ.

heading: Morning Chanting
title: 06. Drinking Water Offering
content:
sugandhaṃ sītalaṃ kappaṃ - pasannamadhuraṃ subhaṃ;

pāṇīyametaṃ bhagavā - patigaṇhātu muttama.

heading: Morning Chanting
title: 07. Warm Water Offering
content:
adhivāsetu no bhante - uṇhodakaṃ parikappitaṃ;

anukampaṃ upādāya - patigaṇhātu muttama.

heading: Morning Chanting
title: 08. Flower Offering
content:
vaṇṇa’gandha’guṇopetaṃ - etaṃ kusumasantatiṃ

pūjayāmī munindassa - sirīpāda saroruhe

pūjemi buddhaṃ kusumena nena – puññena metena labhāmi mokkhaṃ

pupphaṃ miḷāyāti yathā idaṃ me - kāyo tathā yāti vināsabhāvaṃ.

heading: Morning Chanting
title: Recollection of the Buddha
content: itipi so bhagavā arahaṃ sammāsambuddho vijjācaraṇasampanno sugato lokavidū anuttaro purisadammasārathi satthā devamanussānaṃ buddho bhagavā’ti.

heading: Morning Chanting
title: Recollection of the Dhamma
content: Svākkhāto bhagavatā dhammo sandiṭṭhiko akāliko ehipassiko opanayiko paccattaṃ veditabbo viññūhī’ti.

heading: Morning Chanting
title: Recollection of the Saṅgha
content:
Supaṭipanno bhagavato sāvakasaṅgho,

ujupaṭipanno bhagavato sāvakasaṅgho,

ñāyapaṭipanno bhagavato sāvakasaṅgho,

sāmīcipaṭipanno bhagavato sāvakasaṅgho,

yadidaṃ cattāri purisayugāni aṭṭha purisapuggalā

esa bhagavato sāvakasaṅgho, āhuneyyo pāhuneyyo dakkhiṇeyyo añjalikaraṇīyo

anuttaraṃ puññakkhettaṃ lokassā’ti.

heading: Morning Chanting
title: 10. Tribute to the Triple Gem
content:
Buddhadhammā ca pacceka - buddhasaṃghā ca sāmikā

dāso vāha’smi metesaṃ - guṇaṃ ṭhātu sire sadā.

Tisaraṇaṃ tilakkhaṇūpekkhaṃ, nibbānamantimaṃ sukhaṃ

suvande sirasā niccaṃ - labhāmi tividhā mahaṃ.

Tisaraṇaṃ ca sire ṭhātu - sire ṭhātu tilakkhaṇaṃ

upekkhā ca sire ṭhātu - nibbānaṃ ṭhātu me sire.

Buddhe sakaruṇe vande - dhamme paccekasambuddhe

saṃghe ca sirasāyeva - tidhā niccaṃ namāmahaṃ.

Namāmi satthunovāda - appamāda vacanantimaṃ

sabbepi cetiye vande - upajjhācariye mamaṃ

mayhaṃ paṇāmatejena - cittaṃ pāpehi muccatanti.

heading: Morning Chanting
title: 11. Cuddasa buddhañāṇa
content:
(Fourteen Auspicious Knowledge):

  1. Dukkhe ñāṇaṃ, buddha ñāṇaṃ.

  2. Dukkhasamudaye ñāṇaṃ, buddha ñāṇaṃ.

  3. Dukkhanirodhe ñāṇaṃ, buddha ñāṇaṃ.

  4. Dukkhanirodhagāminiyā paṭipadāya ñāṇaṃ, buddha ñāṇaṃ.

  5. Atthapaṭisambhide ñāṇaṃ, buddha ñāṇaṃ.

  6. Dhammapaṭisambhide ñāṇaṃ, buddha ñāṇaṃ.

  7. Niruttipaṭisambhide ñāṇaṃ, buddha ñāṇaṃ.

  8. Paṭibhānapaṭisambhide ñāṇaṃ, buddha ñāṇaṃ.

  9. Indriyaparopariyatte ñāṇaṃ, buddha ñāṇaṃ.

10.Sattānaṃ āsayānusaye ñāṇaṃ, buddha ñāṇaṃ.

11.Yamakapāṭihāriye ñāṇaṃ, buddha ñāṇaṃ.

12.Mahākaruṇāsamāpattiyā ñāṇaṃ, buddha ñāṇaṃ.

13.Sabbaññutañāṇaṃ, buddha ñāṇaṃ.

14.Anāvaraṇañāṇaṃ, buddha ñāṇanti.

Imāni cuddasa buddha ñāṇāni. Imesaṃ aṭṭhañāṇāni sāvaka sādhāraṇāni. Cha ñāṇāni asādhāraṇāni sāvakehi, imehi cuddasa buddha ñāṇehi samannāgataṃ sammāsambuddhaṃ bhagavantaṃ sirasā namāmi.

heading: Morning Chanting
title: 12 Caturārakkhā ( Four Protective Meditations)
content: buddhānussati mettā ca - asubhaṃ maraṇassati iti imā caturārakkhā - bhikkhu bhāveyya sīlavā. Anantavitthāraguṇaṃ - guṇatonussaraṃ muniṃ, bhāveyya buddhimā bhikkhu - buddhānussatimādito.

heading: Morning Chanting
title: Buddhānussati (Recollection of the Buddha)
content:
Savāsane kilese so - eko sabbe nighātiya,

ahū susuddha santāno - pūjānañca sadāraho.

Sabbakālagate dhamme - sabbe sammāsayaṃ muni,

sabbākārena bujjhitvā - eko sabbaññutaṃ gato.

Vipassanādi vijjāhi - sīlādi caraṇehi ca,

susamiddhehi sampanno -gaganābhehi nāyako.

Sammāgato subhaṃ ṭhānaṃ - amoghavacano ca so,

tividhassāpi lokassa – ñātā niravasesato.

Anekehi guṇoghehi - sabbasattuttamo ahū,

anekehi upāyehi - naradamme damesi ca.

Eko sabbassa lokassa- sabbasattānusāsako,

bhāgya issariyādīnaṃ - guṇānaṃ paramo nidhi.

Paññāssa sabbadhammesu - karuṇā sabbajantusu,

attatthānaṃ paratthānaṃ - sādhikā guṇajeṭṭhikā.

Dayāya paramī citvā - paññāyattānamuddhari,

uddharī sabbadhamme ca - dayāyaññe ca uddhari

dissamānopi tāvassa -rūpakāyo acintiyo,

asādhāraṇañāṇaḍḍhe - dhammakāye kathāva kā’ti.

heading: Morning Chanting
title: Mettā bhāvanā (Meditation of Loving-kindness)
content:
Attūpamāya sabbesaṃ - sattānaṃ sukha kāmataṃ,

passitvā kamato mettaṃ - sabbasattesu bhāvaye.

Sukhī bhaveyyaṃ niddukkho - ahaṃ niccaṃ ahaṃ viya,

hitā ca me sukhī hontu – majjhattātha ca verino.

Imamhi gāmakkhettamhi - sattā hontu sukhī sadā,

ato parañca rajjesu – cakkavāḷesu jantuno.

Samantā cakkavāḷesu – sattā’nantesu pāṇino,

sukhino puggalā bhūtā - attabhāvagatā siyuṃ.

Tathā itthī pumā ceva – ariyā anariyāpi ca,

devā narā apāyaṭṭhā - tathā dasadisāsu cāti.

heading: Morning Chanting
title: Asubha bhāvanā (Meditation on Loathsomeness)
content:
Aviññāṇāsubhanibhaṃ - saviññāṇāsubhaṃ imaṃ,

kāyaṃ asubhato passaṃ - asubhaṃ bhāvaye satiṃ.

Vaṇṇa saṇṭhānagandhehi - āsayokāsato tathā,

paṭikkūlāni kāye me - kuṇapāni dvisoḷasa.

Patitamhāpi kuṇapā - jegucchaṃ kāya nissitaṃ,

ādhāro hi sucī tassa - kāye tu kuṇape ṭhitaṃ.

Mīḷhe kimiva kāyoyaṃ - asucimhi samuṭṭhito,

anto asuci sampuṇṇo - puṇṇavaccakuṭī viya.

Asuci sandate niccaṃ - yathā medakathālikā,

nānākimi kulāvāso - pakkacandanikā viya.

Gaṇḍabhūto roga bhūto - vaṇabhūto samussayo,

Atekiccho’tijeguccho - pabhinna kuṇapūpamo.

heading: Morning Chanting
title: Maraṇānussati (Recollection of Death)
content:
pavātadīpa tulyāya - sāyusantatiyākkhayaṃ,

parūpamāya sampassaṃ - bhāvaye maraṇassatiṃ.

Mahā sampatti sampattā - yathā sattā matā idha,

tathā ahaṃ marissāmi - maraṇaṃ mama hessati.

Uppattiyā sahevedaṃ - maraṇaṃ āgataṃ sadā,

maraṇatthāya okāsaṃ - vadhako viya esati.

Īsakaṃ anivattantaṃ - satataṃ gamanussukaṃ,

jīvitaṃ udayā atthaṃ - suriyo viya dhāvati.

Vijju bubbula ussāva - jalarājī parikkhayaṃ,

ghātakova ripū tassa - sabbatthāpi avāriyo.

Suyasatthāma puññiddhi - buddhi vuddhi jinadvayaṃ,

ghātesi maraṇaṃ khippaṃ - kā tu mādisake kathā.

Paccayānañca vekalyā - bāhirajjhattupaddavā,

Marāmoraṃ nimesāpi - maramano anukkhaṇaṃ.

heading: Morning Chanting
title: Aṭṭhamahā saṃvega vatthūni
content:
Bhāvetvā caturārakkhā - āvajjeyya anantaraṃ,

mahā saṃvegavatthūni - aṭṭha aṭṭhita vīriyo.

Jāti jarā vyādhi cutī apāyā - atīta appattaka vaṭṭa dukkhaṃ,

idāni āhāragaveṭṭhi dukkhaṃ - saṃvegavatthūni imāni aṭṭha.

Pāto ca sāyamapi ceva imaṃ vidhiññū āsevate satata matta hitābhilāsi,

pappoti soti vipulaṃ hata pāripantho seṭṭhaṃ sukhaṃ munivisiṭṭha mataṃ sukhena cāti.

heading: Morning Chanting
title: 13. Paritta Chanting:
content:
1. Metta sutta: karaṇīyamattakusalena…….

Ii. Mora sutta (first half): udetayaṃ cakkhumā……..

Iii. Suttas (in row for each day):

A. Monday - jayamaṅgala gāthā.

B. Tuesday - jinapañjara paritta.

C. Wednesday - aṭṭhavīsa paritta.

D. Thursday - bojjhaṅga parita.

E. Friday -rāhulovāda gāthā.

heading: Morning Chanting
title: 14. Anumodanā gāthā (sharing merits)
content:
Idaṃ vo ñātīnaṃ hotu sukhitā hontu ñātayo!!! (three times)

ākāsaṭṭhā ca bhummaṭṭhā deva nāgā mahiddhikā puññaṃ taṃ anumoditvā ciraṃ rakkhantu sambuddha sāsanaṃ!

ākāsaṭṭhā ca bhummaṭṭhā deva nāgā mahiddhikā puññaṃ taṃ anumoditvā ciraṃ rakkhantu sambuddha desanaṃ!

ākāsaṭṭhā ca bhummaṭṭhā deva nāgā mahiddhikā puññaṃ taṃ anumoditvā ciraṃ rakkhantu sambuddha sāvakaṃ!

iminā puñña kammena mā me bāla samāgamo sataṃ samāgamo hotu yāva nibbāna pattiyā!!! (Three times)

idaṃ me puñña kammaṃ āsavakkhayā vahaṃ hotu!

idaṃ me puñña kammaṃ āsavakkhayā vahaṃ hotu!

idaṃ me puñña kammaṃ āsavakkhayā vahaṃ hotu, sabba dukkhā pamuñcatu!

heading: Morning Chanting
title: 15. Paṭipatti Pūjā adhiṭṭhāna
content:
imāya dhammānudhammapaṭipattiyā buddhaṃ pūjemi!

imāya dhammānudhammapaṭipattiyā dhammaṃ pūjemi!

imāya dhammānudhammapaṭipattiyā saṃghaṃ pūjemi!

addhā imāya paṭipattiyā jāti, jarā, maraṇamhā parimuñcissāmī’ti!

heading: Morning Chanting
title: 16. Khamāpana Gāthā (Asking for forgiveness)
content:
Kāyena vācā cittena - pamādena mayā kataṃ

accayaṃ khama me bhante - bhūripañña tathāgata.

Kāyena vācā cittena-pamādena mayā kataṃ

accayaṃ khama me dhamma - sandiṭṭhika akālika.

Kāyena vācā cittena - pamādena mayā kataṃ

accayaṃ khama me saṃgha - puññakkhetta anuttara.

sādhu! sādhu! sādhu!

heading: Evening Chanting Sunday
title: Preliminary Homage
content: Namo tassa bhagavato arahato sammāsambuddhassa

heading: Evening Chanting Sunday
title: 01. Invitation
content:
yāvatā bhagavā loke - tiṭṭheyya tava sāsanaṃ;

tāvatā patigaṇhātu - pūjā lokānukampayā.

heading: Evening Chanting Sunday
title: 02. Offering lamps and candles
content:
veneyyahadaye moha - tamokkhandhavinodakaṃ

dīpanetena pūjemi - paññādīpadharaṃ jinaṃ

iminā puññakammena - paññavā sīlavā sadā

bhavitvāhaṃ labhe sīghaṃ - dhammacakkhuṃ anuttaraṃ

heading: Evening Chanting Sunday
title: 03. Offering incense
content:
desetvā pavaraṃ dhammaṃ - pāpāmagandha nāsakaṃ

sugandhinā’haṃ gandhena - pūjemi lokanāyakaṃ

heading: Evening Chanting Sunday
title: 04. Offering drinking water
content:
dhammodakena sattānaṃ - pāpamala visodhakaṃ

pānīyenābhipūjemi - lokanāthaṃ dayālayaṃ

heading: Evening Chanting Sunday
title: 05. Offering Permissible Drinks:
content:
tidosasamanaṃ deha - baladaṃ āyuvaḍḍhanaṃ

gilānapaccayaṃ etaṃ - paṇītaṃ madhuraṃ suciṃ

mahādayassa pūjemi - kilesāmayahārino

puññenetena pappomi - sabbasaññojanakkhayaṃ

heading: Evening Chanting Sunday
title: 06. Medicinal Betel
content:
yathāvādī tathākārī - dhammavādī mahāyaso

tāmbūlaṃ patigaṇhātu – satthā loke anuttaro.

heading: Evening Chanting Sunday
title: 07. Offering Flower:
content:
ananta guṇavaṇṇassa - suddhasīlasugandhino

pūjemi lokanāthassa -pupphametaṃ manoramaṃ

iminā puññakammena - bhavitvā sīlavā sadā

pappomi paramaṃ santiṃ - nibbānaṃ buddhavaṇṇitaṃ.

heading: Evening Chanting Sunday
title: 08. Offering Flags:
content:
dhammaddhajadharaṃ dhīraṃ - dhajuggata mahāyasaṃ

dhajenetena pūjemi - dhammarājaṃ dhajūpamaṃ.

heading: Evening Chanting Sunday
title: 09. Parikkhāra pūjā (Offering requisites):
content:
samatthaṃ appakārampi - karaṇe vipulapphalaṃ

parikkhārena pūjemi - acinteyya guṇaṃ jinaṃ.

heading: Evening Chanting Sunday
title: 10. Buddha-Vandanā (Homage to the Buddha):
content:
itipi so bhagavā arahaṃ sammāsambuddho vijjācaraṇa sampanno sugato lokavidū anuttaro purisadamma sārathi satthā devamanussānaṃ buddho bhagavāti.

So bhagavā itipi arahaṃ, arahaṃ vata so bhagavā, taṃ bhagavantaṃ arahantaṃ sirasā namāmi. Tassa bhagavato arahato attānaṃ pariccajāmi, pariccattoyeva me attā tassa bhagavato arahato, sāvako hamasmi, sisso hamasmi.

Ārakattā hatattā ca - kilesārīna so munī,

hata saṃsāra cakkāro - paccayādīna cāraho,

na raho karoti pāpāni - arahaṃ taṃ namāmahaṃ.

So bhagavā itipi sammāsambuddho, sammāsambuddho vata so bhagavā, taṃ bhagavantaṃ sammāsambuddhaṃ sirasā namāmi. Tassa bhagavato sammāsambuddhassa attānaṃ pariccajāmi, pariccattoyeva me attā tassa bhagavato sammāsambuddhassa, sāvako hamasmi, sisso hamasmi.

Sammāsambuddha saddhamma - sammāsambuddha desana,

sammāsambuddha ñeyyassa - sammāsambuddha te namo.

So bhagavā itipi vijjācaraṇa sampanno, vijjācaraṇa sampanno vata so bhagavā, taṃ bhagavantaṃ vijjācaraṇa sampannaṃ sirasā namāmi. Tassa bhagavato vijjācaraṇa sampannassa attānaṃ pariccajāmi, pariccattoyeva me attā tassa bhagavato vijjācaraṇa sampannassa, sāvako hamasmi, sisso hamasmi.

Vijjācaraṇasampanno - tisso vijjā pakāsitā,

aṭṭhavijjā pañcadasa - caraṇaṃ taṃ namāmahaṃ,

so bhagavā itipi sugato, sugato vata so bhagavā, taṃ bhagavantaṃ sugataṃ sirasā namāmi. Tassa bhagavato sugatassa attānaṃ pariccajāmi, pariccattoyeva me attā tassa bhagavato sugatassa, sāvako hamasmi, sisso hamasmi.

Sugatattā sugattattā - sobhanā yassa vā gati,

gatattā sundaraṃ ṭhānaṃ - sugato nāma te namo.

So bhagavā itipi lokavidū, lokavidū vata so bhagavā, taṃ bhagavantaṃ lokaviduṃ sirasā namāmi. Tassa bhagavato lokaviduno attānaṃ pariccajāmi, pariccattoyeva me attā tassa bhagavato lokaviduno, sāvako hamasmi, sisso hamasmi.

Sattāvāsādi saṃkhāte - kāmarūpādike tathā,

saṃkhāra-satta-mokāsa - loke yo vedi taṃ name.

So bhagavā itipi anuttaro purisadammasārathi, anuttaro purisadammasārathi vata so bhagavā, taṃ bhagavantaṃ anuttaraṃ purisadammasārathiṃ sirasā namāmi. Tassa bhagavato anuttarassa purisadamma sārathino attānaṃ pariccajāmi, pariccattoyeva me attā tassa bhagavato anuttarassa purisadammasārathino, sāvako hamasmi, sisso hamasmi.

Yo loke anuttaro deva - brahmāsuranarorage,

damesi damme purise - sārathiṃ taṃ namāmahaṃ.

So bhagavā itipi satthā devamanussānaṃ, satthā devamanussānaṃ vata so bhagavā, taṃ bhagavantaṃ satthāraṃ devamanussānaṃ sirasā namāmi. Tassa bhagavato satthuno devamanussānaṃ attānaṃ pariccajāmi, pariccattoyeva me attā tassa bhagavato satthuno devamanussānaṃ, sāvako hamasmi, sisso hamasmi.

Dātā tibhavasampattiṃ - netā sivapuraṃ varaṃ,

satthā devamanussānaṃ - taṃ namāmi naruttamaṃ.

So bhagavā itipi buddho, buddho vata so bhagavā, taṃ bhagavantaṃ buddhaṃ sirasā namāmi. Tassa bhagavato buddhassa attānaṃ pariccajāmi, pariccattoyeva me attā tassa bhagavato buddhassa, sāvako hamasmi, sisso hamasmi.

Catusacca mabujjhittha - bodhetā yo pajāya ca,

sāmaṃ saccāni sambujjhi - taṃ buddhaṃ paṇamāmahaṃ.

So bhagavā itipi bhagavā, bhagavā vata so bhagavā, taṃ bhagavantaṃ bhagavantaṃ sirasā namāmi. Tassa bhagavato bhagavato attānaṃ pariccajāmi, pariccattoyeva me attā tassa bhagavato bhagavato, sāvako hamasmi, sisso hamasmi.

Bhāgyavā bhaggavā yutto - bhagehi ca vibhattavā,

bhavesu vantagamano - bhagavā nāma te namo.

Atītā ye ca sambuddhā - ye ca buddhā anāgatā,

paccuppannā ca ye buddhā - ahaṃ vandāmi sabbadā

natthi me saraṇaṃ aññaṃ - buddho me saraṇaṃ varaṃ,

etena saccavajjena - hotu me jayamaṃgalaṃ.

Uttamaṃgena vandehaṃ - pādapaṃsuvaruttamaṃ,

buddhe yo khalito doso - buddho khamatu taṃ mamaṃ.

heading: Evening Chanting Sunday
title: 11. Dhamma-vandanā (Homage to the Dhamma):
content:
svakkhāto bhagavatā dhammo sandiṭṭhiko akāliko ehipassiko opanayiko paccattaṃ veditabbo viññūhīti.

Svākkhāto vata tassa bhagavato so dhammo, sandiṭṭhiko vata tassa bhagavato so dhammo, akāliko vata tassa bhagavato so dhammo,

ehipassiko vata tassa bhagavato so dhammo, opanayiko vata tassa bhagavato so dhammo,

paccattaṃ veditabbo viññūhi vata tassa bhagavato so dhammo,

taṃ svākkhātaṃ bhagavato dhammaṃ sandiṭṭhikaṃ akālikaṃ ehipassikaṃ opanayikaṃ paccattaṃ veditabbaṃ viññūhi sirasā namāmi. Tassa bhagavato dhammassa attānaṃ pariccajāmi, pariccattoyeva me attā tassa bhagavato dhammassa, sāvako hamasmi, sisso hamasmi.

atītā ye ca saddhammā - ye ca dhammā anāgatā, paccuppannā ca ye dhammā - ahaṃ vandāmi sabbadā

natthi me saraṇaṃ aññaṃ - dhammo me saraṇaṃ varaṃ, etena saccavajjena - hotu me jayamaṃgalaṃ.

Uttamaṃgena vandehaṃ - dhammaṃ ca tividhaṃ varaṃ, dhamme yo khalito doso - dhammo khamatu taṃ mamaṃ.

heading: Evening Chanting Sunday
title: 12. Saṅgha-vandanā (Homage to the Sangha):
content:
supaṭipanno bhagavato sāvaka saṅgho, ujupaṭipanno bhagavato sāvaka saṅgho, ñāyapaṭipanno bhagavato sāvaka saṅgho, sāmīcipaṭipanno bhagavato sāvaka saṅgho, yadidaṃ cattāri purisa yugāni aṭṭha purisa puggalā esa bhagavato sāvaka saṅgho, āhuneyyo, pāhuneyyo, dakkhiṇeyyo, añjalikaraṇīyo, anuttaraṃ puññakkhettaṃ lokassāti.

Supaṭipanno vata so bhagavato sāvakasaṅgho, ujupaṭipanno vata so bhagavato sāvakasaṅgho,

ñāyapaṭipanno vata so bhagavato sāvakasaṅgho,

sāmīcipaṭipanno vata so bhagavato sāvakasaṅgho, āhuneyyo vata so bhagavato sāvakasaṅgho,

pāhuneyyo vata so bhagavato sāvakasaṅgho,

dakkhiṇeyyo vata so bhagavato sāvakasaṅgho,

añjalikaraṇīyo vata so bhagavato sāvakasaṅgho, anuttaraṃ puññakkhettaṃ lokassa vata so bhagavato sāvakasaṅgho,

taṃ bhagavato sāvaka saṅghaṃ supaṭipannaṃ ujupaṭipannaṃ ñāyapaṭipannaṃ sāmīcipaṭipannaṃ āhuneyyaṃ pāhuneyyaṃ dakkhiṇeyyaṃ añjalikaraṇīyaṃ anuttaraṃ puññakkhettaṃ lokassa sirasā namāmi.

Tassa bhagavato sāvakasaṅghassa attānaṃ pariccajāmi, pariccattoyeva me attā tassa bhagavato sāvakasaṅghassa, sāvako hamasmi, sisso hamasmi.

Ye ca saṅghā atītā ca - ye ca saṅghā anāgatā, paccuppannā ca ye saṅghā - ahaṃ vandāmi sabbadā natthi me saraṇaṃ aññaṃ - saṅgho me saraṇaṃ varaṃ, etena sacca vajjena - hotu me jayamaṃgalaṃ.

Uttamaṃgena vandehaṃ - saṅghaṃ ca tividhottamaṃ,

Saṅghe yo khalito doso - saṅgho khamatu taṃ mamaṃ.

heading: Evening Chanting Sunday
title: 13. Cetiya vandanā (Veneration of pagodas, etc.):
content:
sabbapāpavisuddhassa - anantaguṇa dhārino,

namāmi lokanāthassa - sādaraṃ dhātu cetiyaṃ.

heading: Evening Chanting Sunday
title: 14. Catu Saṃvejanīya-ṭhāna-vandanā:
content:
māyā suto sugata sākiya sīhanātho - jātakkhaṇe sapadasā vabhisaṃkamitvā;

yasmiṃ udīrayi giraṃ varalumbiṇimhi - taṃ jāta cetiyamahaṃ sirasā namāmi.

Yasmiṃ nisajja vajirāsana bandhanena - jetvā savāsana kilesa balaṃ munindo;

sambodhi ñāṇamavagamma vihāsi sammā - taṃ bodhi cetiyamahaṃ sirasā namāmi.

Saṅkampayaṃ dasasahassiya loka dhātuṃ - desesi yatra bhagavā vara dhamma cakkaṃ;

barāṇasīpura samīpa vane migānaṃ - taṃ dhamma cetiyamahaṃ sirasā namāmi.

Katvāna loka hitamatta hitañca nātho - āsītikova upavattana kānanamhi;

yasmiṃ nipajja gatavā nirupādhisesaṃ - nibbāna cetiyamahaṃ sirasā namāmi.

heading: Evening Chanting Sunday
title: 15. Dhātu-Cetiya Vandanā
content: buddhaṃ dhammaṃ ca saṃghaṃ sugatatanubhavā dhātuyo dhātugabbhe laṅkāyaṃ jambudīpe tidasapuravare nāgaloke ca thūpe sabbe buddhassa bimbe sakaladasadise kesalomādi dhātuṃ vande sabbepi buddhaṃ dasabalatanujaṃ bodhicetiyaṃ sirasā namāmi.

heading: Evening Chanting Sunday
title: 16. Veneration of all Cetiya:
content:
vandāmi cetiyaṃ sabbaṃ - sabbaṭhānesu patiṭṭhitaṃ sārīrika dhātu mahā bodhiṃ - buddharūpaṃ sakalaṃ sadā.

……..dhamma desanā……..

heading: Evening Chanting Sunday
title: 18. Āṭānāṭiya Gāthā
content:
vipassissa namatthu - cakkhumantassa sirīmato

sikhissapi namatthu - sabba bhūtānukampino

vessabhussa namatthu - nahātakassa tapassino namatthu kakusandhassa - mārasenā pamaddino

koṇāgamanassa namatthu - brāhmaṇassa vusīmato

kassapassa namatthu - vippamuttassa sabbadhi

Aṅgīrasassa namatthu - sakyaputtassa sirīmato namo tesaṃ sattannaṃ - sammāsambuddhānanti.

heading: Evening Chanting Sunday
title: 19. Homage to all the Buddhas
content:
Paṭhavī bala sundarī - sabbaññu bodhi maṇḍalaṃ asaṃkhyeṃ mārasenaṃ - jayo jayatu maṃgalaṃ kakusandho koṇāgamano - kassapo gotamo munī

metteyyo pañca buddhā te - sīse me sentu sabbadā etesaṃ ānubhāvena - yakkhā devā mahiddhikā sabbepi sukhitā hontu - mama mittā sahāyakā sambuddhe aṭṭhavīsaṃ ca - dvādasaṃ ca sahassake pañcasatasahassāni - namāmi sirasādaraṃ appakā vālukā gaṃgā - anantā nibbutā jinā

tesaṃ dhammañca saṃghañca - ādarena namāmyahaṃ namakkārānubhāvena - hitvā sabbe upaddave anekā antarāyāpi - vinassantu asesato.

heading: Evening Chanting Sunday
title: 20. Ovāda Pātimokkha
content:
khantī paramaṃ tapo titikkhā - nibbānaṃ paramaṃ vadanti buddhā

na hi pabbajito parūpaghātī - samaṇo hoti paraṃ viheṭhayanto sabba pāpassa akaraṇaṃ - kusalassa upasampadā sacittapariyodapanaṃ - etaṃ buddhānasāsanaṃ.

Anūpavādo anūpaghāto - pātimokkhe ca saṃvaro mattaññutā ca bhattasmiṃ - panthañca sayanāsanaṃ adhicitte ca āyogo - etaṃ buddhānasāsanaṃ.

heading: Evening Chanting Sunday
title: 21. Vipassanā Gāthā
content:
sabbe saṃkhārā aniccāti - yadā paññāya passati atha nibbindatī dukkhe - esa maggo visuddhiyā

sabbe saṃkhārā dukkhāti - yadā paññāya passati atha nibbindatī dukkhe - esa maggo visuddhiyā sabbe dhammā anattāti - yadā paññāya passati

atha nibbindatī dukkhe - esa maggo visuddhiyā.

heading: Evening Chanting Sunday
title: 22. Sharing Merits
content:
Dīrgha puṇyānumodanāva hā prārthanā gāthā:

Iminā puññakammena - upajjhāyā guṇuttarā ācariyupakārā ca - mātā pitā piyā mamaṃ

suriyo candimā rājā - guṇavantā narāpi ca brahmā mārā ca indā ca - lokapālā ca devatā

yamo mittā manussā ca - majjhattā verikāpi ca sabbe sattā sukhī hontu - puññāni pakatāni me.

Sukhaṃ ca tividhaṃ dentu - khippaṃ pāpetha vomataṃ iminā puñña kammena - iminā uddisena ca

khippāhantu labhe ceva - taṇhūpādāna chedanaṃ ye santāne hīnā dhammā - yāva nibbānato mamaṃ

nassantu sabbadāyeva - yattha jāto bhave bhave

ujucitto satī pañño - sallekho viriyavāminā

mārā labhantu nokāsaṃ - kātuṃ ca viriye tu me buddho dīpavaro nātho - dhammo nātho varuttamo

nātho paccekasambuddho - saṃgho nāthottaro mamaṃ tesottamānubhāvena - mārokāsaṃ labhantu mā.

Bhavaggupādāya avīci heṭṭhato - etthantare sattakāyūpapannā rūpī arūpī ca asaññisaññino - dukkhā pamuccantu phusantu nibbutiṃ

devo vassatu kālena - sassa sampattihetu ca phīto bhavatu loko ca - rājā bhavatu dhammiko.

heading: Evening Chanting Sunday
title: 23. Sugatovāda (the Buddha’s Daily Admonishment):
content:
appamādena bhikkhave sampādetha,

dullabho buddhuppādo lokasmiṃ,

dullabho manussattapaṭilābho, dullabhā khaṇasampatti, dullabhā pabbajjā,

dullabhaṃ saddhammasavanaṃ,

dullabho sappurisasaṃsevo.

Ārabhatha nikkhamatha yuñjatha buddha sāsane, dhunātha maccuno senaṃ naḷāgāraṃva kuñjaro.

Yo imasmiṃ dhamma vinaye appamatto vihessati, pahāya jāti saṃsāraṃ dukkhassantaṃ karissati.

heading: Evening Chanting Sunday
title: 24. Paccavekkhaṇā:
content:
Cīvara paṭisaṅkhā yoniso cīvaraṃ paṭisevāmi – ‘Yāvadeva sītassa paṭighātāya, uṇhassa paṭighātāya, ḍaṃsamakasavātātapasiriṃsapasamphassānaṃ paṭighātāya, yāvadeva hirikopīnapaṭicchādanatthaṃ’.

Piṇḍapāta

Paṭisaṅkhā yoniso piṇḍapātaṃ paṭisevāmi – ‘Neva davāya na madāya na maṇḍanāya na vibhūsanāya, yāvadeva imassa kāyassa ṭhitiyā yāpanāya, vihiṃsūparatiyā brahmacariyānuggahāya, iti purāṇañca vedanaṃ paṭihaṅkhāmi, navañca vedanaṃ na uppādessāmi, yātrā ca me bhavissati anavajjatā ca phāsuvihāro cāti.

Senāsana

Paṭisaṅkhā yoniso senāsanaṃ paṭisevāmi –‘Yāvadeva sītassa paṭighātāya, uṇhassa paṭighātāya, ḍaṃsamakasavātātapasarīsapasamphassānaṃ paṭighātāya, yāvadeva utuparissayavinodanaṃ paṭisallānārāmatthaṃ’.

Gilānappaccaya

Paṭisaṅkhā yoniso gilānappaccayabhesajjaparikkhāraṃ paṭisevāmi –‘Yāvadeva uppannānaṃ veyyābādhikānaṃ vedanānaṃ paṭighātāya, abyābajjhaparamatāyā’ti.

heading: Evening Chanting Sunday
title: 25. Paṭipatti Pūjā adhiṭṭhāna:
content:
imāya dhammānudhammapaṭipattiyā buddhaṃ pūjemi!

imāya dhammānudhammapaṭipattiyā dhammaṃ pūjemi!

imāya dhammānudhammapaṭipattiyā saṃghaṃ pūjemi!

addhā imāya paṭipattiyā jāti, jarā, maraṇamhā parimuccissāmī’ti!

heading: Evening Chanting Sunday
title: 26. Khamāpana gāthā (Asking for fougiveness):
content:
kāyena vācācittena pamādena mayā kataṃ

accayaṃ khama me bhante bhūripañña tathāgata.

Kāyena vācācittena pamādena mayā kataṃ

accayaṃ khama me dhamma sandiṭṭhika akālika.

Kāyena vācācittena pamādena mayā kataṃ

accayaṃ khama me saṃgha puññakkhetta anuttara.

Sādhu! sādhu! sādhu!

heading: Monday/ Wednesday
title: Preliminary Homage
content: Namo tassa bhagavato arahato sammāsambuddhassa!!!

heading: Monday/ Wednesday
title: 01. Ārādhanā (Invitation)
content:
Yāvatā bhagavā loke - tiṭṭheyya tava sāsanaṃ;

tāvatā patigaṇhātu - pūjā lokānukampayā.

heading: Monday/ Wednesday
title: 02. Padīpa pūjā (Offering Oil Lamp)
content:
Gandhatelappadittena - dīpena tama dhaṃsinā;

tilokadīpaṃ sambuddhaṃ - pūjayāmī tamonudaṃ.

Sittha telappa dittena - dīpena tama dhaṃsinā;

tileāka dīpaṃ sambuddhaṃ - pūjayāmī tamonudaṃ.

heading: Monday/ Wednesday
title: 03. Gandha pūjā (Offering Fragrance)
content:
sugandhikāya vadanaṃ - ananta guṇagandhinaṃ;

sugandhināhaṃ gandhena - pūjayāmī tathāgataṃ.

heading: Monday/ Wednesday
title: 04. Gandhodaka pūjā (Offering Drinking water)
content:
sugandhaṃ sītalaṃ kappaṃ - pasanna madhuraṃ subhaṃ;

pānīya metaṃ bhagavā - patigaṇhātu muttama.

heading: Monday/ Wednesday
title: 05. Uṇhodaka pūjā (Warm Water)
content:
adhivāsetu neā bhante - uṇhodakaṃ parikappitaṃ;

anukampaṃ upādāya - patigaṇhātu muttama.

heading: Monday/ Wednesday
title: 06. Pānaka pūjā (Offering Allowable Drinks)
content:
adhivāsetu no bhante- gilānapaccayaṃ imaṃ;

anukampaṃ upādāya - patigaṇhātu muttama.

heading: Monday/ Wednesday
title: 07. Phuppa pūjā (Offering Flower)
content:
nirodha samāpattito vuṭṭhahitvā viya

nisinnaṃ bhagavantaṃ arahantaṃ sammāsambuddhaṃ

iminā pupphena pūjemi pūjemi pūjemi.

ayaṃ puppha pūjā buddha pacceka buddha

aggasāvaka mahāsāvaka arahantādīnaṃ sabhāvasīlaṃ

ahampi tesaṃ anuvattako homi.

Idaṃ pupphaṃ idāni vaṇṇenapi suvaṇṇaṃ

gandhenapi sugandhaṃ

saṇṭhāṇenapi susaṇṭhānaṃ

khippameva dubbaṇṇaṃ duggandhaṃ dussaṇṭhānaṃ aniccataṃ pāpuṇissati

evameva kho sabbe saṃkhārā aniccā

sabbe saṃkhārā dukkhā

sabbe dhammā anattāti.

heading: Monday/ Wednesday
title: 08. Homage to the Buddha
content:
amhākaṃ bhagavato evaṃ kalyāṇo kittisaddo abbhuggato

yo pi so bhagavā asītyānubyañjana patimaṇḍita

dvattiṃsākāra mahā purisa lakkhaṇa vicitta rūpakāyo

sabbākāra parisuddha sīlakkhandhādi guṇaratana samiddhidhammakāyo

yasamahanta, puññamahanta

thāmamahanta, iddhimahanta

paññāmahantānaṃ pāragato

asamo, asamasamo

appaṭimo, appaṭisamo

appaṭibhāgo, appaṭipuggalo arahaṃ sammāsambuddho

vijjācaraṇasampanno sugato lokavidū

anuttaro purisadammasārathi

satthā devamanussānaṃ buddho bhagavā’ti.

Imehi guṇehi samannāgataṃ arahantaṃ sammāsambuddhaṃ

nibbānatthāya sirasā namāmi.

jīvitaṃ yāva nibbānaṃ buddhaṃ saraṇaṃ gacchāmi.

heading: Monday/ Wednesday
title: 09. Homage to the Dhamma
content:
svakkhāto bhagavatā dhammo

sandiṭṭhiko akāliko

ehipassiko opaneyyiko

paccattaṃ veditabbo viññūhī’ti.

imehi guṇehi samannāgataṃ

sakala lokavimohaka mohadhaṃsakaṃ

pavaranīyāṇikaṃ saddhammaṃ

nibbānatthāya sirasā namāmi.

jīvitaṃ yāva nibbānaṃ dhammaṃ saraṇaṃ gacchāmi.

heading: Monday/ Wednesday
title: 10. Homage to the Saṅgha
content:
suppaṭipanno bhagavato sāvakasaṅgho

ujupaṭipanno bhagavato sāvakasaṅgho

ñāyapaṭipanno bhagavato sāvakasaṅgho

sāmīcipaṭipanno bhagavato sāvakasaṅgho

yadidaṃ cattāri purisayugāni aṭṭha purisapuggalā

esa bhagavato sāvakasaṅgho

āhuneyyo pāhuneyyo

dakkhiṇeyyo añjalikaraṇīyo

anuttaraṃ puññakkhettaṃ lokassā’ti.

Imehi guṇehi samannāgataṃ

anaghuttama dakkhiṇeyyaṃ pavara saṅgharatanaṃ

nibbānatthāya sirasā namāmi.

jīvitaṃ yāva nibbānaṃ saṃghaṃ saraṇaṃ gacchāmi.

Monday: Tesattati ñāṇavandanā

Wednesday: Sattasattati ñāṇāvandanā

heading: Monday/ Wednesday
title: 11. Catu Saṅvejanīyaṭhāna
content:
māyā suto sugata sākiya sīhanātho –

jātakkhaṇe sapadasāvabhisaṃkamitvā;

yasmiṃ udīrayi giraṃ varalumbiṇimhi –

taṃ jāta cetiyamahaṃ sirasā namāmi.

Yasmiṃ nisajja vajirāsana bandhanena – jetvā savāsana kilesa balaṃ munindo;

sambodhi ñāṇamavagamma vihāsi sammā –

taṃ bodhi cetiyamahaṃ sirasā namāmi.

Saṅkampayaṃ dasasahassiya loka dhātuṃ - desesi yatra bhagavā vara dhamma cakkaṃ;

barāṇasīpura samīpa vane migānaṃ - taṃ dhamma cetiyamahaṃ sirasā namāmi.

Katvāna loka hitamatta hitañca nātho – āsītikova upavattana kānanamhi;

yasmiṃ nipajja gatavā nirupādhisesaṃ - nibbāna cetiyamahaṃ sirasā namāmi.

heading: Monday/ Wednesday
title: 12. Cetiya Vandanā (Veneration of pagodas, etc.)
content: vandāmi cetiyaṃ sabbaṃ - sabbaṭhānesu patiṭṭhitaṃ sārīrika dhātu mahā bodhiṃ - buddharūpaṃ sakalaṃ sadā.

heading: Monday/ Wednesday
title: 13. Paritta Chanting
content:
• i. Metta Sutta.
  • ii. Mora Paritta – Last half.
  • iii. Khandha Paritta - verses.
  • iv. Āṭānāṭiyaparitta

vipassissa namatthu - cakkhumantassa sirīmato sikhissapi namatthu - sabba bhūtānukampino

vessabhussa namatthu - nahātakassa tapassino

namatthu kakusandhassa - mārasenā pamaddino

koṇāgamanassa namatthu - brāhmaṇassa vusīmato kassapassa namatthu - vippamuttassa sabbadhi aṃgīrasassa namatthu - sakyaputtassa sirīmato

namo tesaṃ sattannaṃ - sammāsambuddhānanti.

heading: Monday/ Wednesday
title: 14. Sugatovāda (the Buddha’s daily admonishment)
content:
appamādena bhikkhave sampādetha,

dullabho buddhuppādo lokasmiṃ,

dullabho manussatta paṭilābho, dullabhā khaṇa sampatti, dullabhā pabbajjā,

dullabhaṃ saddhamma savanaṃ,

dullabho sappurisa saṃsevo,

ārabhatha nikkhamatha yuñjatha buddha sāsane, dhunātha maccuno senaṃ naḷāgāraṃva kuñjaro.

Yo imasmiṃ dhamma vinaye appamatto vihessati, pahāya jāti saṃsāraṃ dukkhassantaṃ karissati.

heading: Monday/ Wednesday
title: 15. Bhāvanā
content: (Meditation period)

heading: Monday/ Wednesday
title: 16. Paccavekkhanā – Atīta/ Dātu/ Asubha
content:
Cīvara

mayāpaccavekkhitvā ajja yaṃ cīvaraṃ paribhuttaṃ taṃ – ‘Yāvadeva sītassa paṭighātāya

uṇhassa paṭighātāya

ḍaṃsamakasavātātapasiriṃsapasamphassānaṃ paṭighātāya

yāvadeva hirikopīnapaṭicchādanatthaṃ.

Yathāpaccayaṃ pavattamānaṃ dhātumattamevetaṃ yadidaṃ cīvaraṃ

tadupabhuñjako ca puggalo dhātumattako nissatto nijjīvo suñño

sabbāni pana imāni cīvarāni, ajigucchanīyāni

imaṃ pūtikāyaṃ patvā ativiya jigucchanīyāni jāyantī.

Piṇḍapāta

Mayāpaccavekkhitvā ajja yo piṇḍapāto paribhutto

so – ‘Neva davāya na madāya na maṇḍanāya na vibhūsanāya

yāvadeva imassa kāyassa ṭhitiyā yāpanāya

vihiṃsūparatiyā brahmacariyānuggahāya

iti purāṇañca vedanaṃ paṭihaṅkhāmi, navañca vedanaṃ na uppādessāmi

yātrā ca me bhavissati anavajjatā ca phāsuvihāro cāti.

Yathāpaccayaṃ pavattamānaṃ dhātumattamevetaṃ yadidaṃ piṇḍapāto

tadupa bhuñjako ca puggalo dhātumattako nissatto nijjīvo suñño

sabbo panāyaṃ piṇḍapāto ajigucchanīyo

imaṃ pūtikāyaṃ patvā ativiya jigucchanīyo jāyatī.

Senāsana

Mayāpaccavekkhitvā ajjayaṃ senāsanaṃ paribhuttaṃ

taṃ – yāvadeva sītassa paṭighātāya, uṇhassa paṭighātāya

ḍaṃsamakasavātātapasarīsapasamphassānaṃ paṭighātāya

yāvadeva utuparissayavinodaṃ paṭisallānārāmatthaṃ.

Yathāpaccayaṃ pavattamānaṃ dhātumattamevetaṃ yadidaṃ senāsanaṃ

tadupabhuñjako ca puggalo

dhātumattako nissatto nijjīvo suñño

sabbāni pana imāni senāsanāni ajigucchanīyāni

imaṃ pūtikāyaṃ patvā ativiya jigucchanīyāni jāyantī.

Gilānappaccaya

Mayāpaccavekkhitvā ajjayo gilānappaccayabhesajjaparikkhāro paribhutto

so– ‘Yāvadeva uppannānaṃ veyyābādhikānaṃ vedanānaṃ paṭighātāya

abyābajjhaparamatāyā’ti.

Yathāpaccayaṃ pavattamānaṃ dhātumattamevetaṃ yadidaṃ gilānappaccayabhesajjaparikkhāro

tadupabhuñjako ca puggalo

dhātumattako nissatto nijjīvo suñño

sabbo panāyaṃ gilānappaccayabhesajjaparikkhāro ajigucchanīyo

imaṃ pūtikāyaṃ patvā ativiya jigucchanīyo jāyatī.

heading: Monday/ Wednesday
title: 17. Anumodanā gāthā (Sharing Merits)
content:
To Past relatives
idaṃ vo ñātīnaṃ hotu sukhitā hontu ñātayo!!! (Three times)

To Celestial and all Beings
ākāsaṭṭhā ca bhummaṭṭhā devā nāgā mahiddhikā puññaṃ taṃ anumoditvā ciraṃ rakkhantu sambuddha sāsanaṃ!

ākāsaṭṭhā ca bhummaṭṭhā devā nāgā mahiddhikā

puññaṃ taṃ anumoditvā ciraṃ rakkhantu sambuddha desanaṃ!

ākāsaṭṭhā ca bhummaṭṭhā devā nāgā mahiddhikā puññaṃ taṃ anumoditvā ciraṃ rakkhantu sambuddha sāvakaṃ!

kappasatasahassāni soḷasāpi asaṅkhiye, sambharaṃ bodhisambhāre āgato jāti jātiyo, niyato buddhabhāvāya bhaddakappe idhantime, bodhisatto ca metteyyo puññaṃ me anumodatu!

cattāro ca mahārājā sakko cāti surāpare, anumoditvā imaṃ puññaṃ rakkhantu jina sāsanaṃ!

asmiṃ vihāre ca ārāme adhivatthā ca devatā, anumoditvā imaṃ puññaṃ rakkhantu jina sāsanaṃ! sabbe sattā ca majjhattā hitā ca ahitā ca me, anumoditvā imaṃ puññaṃ bujjhantu amataṃ padaṃ!

To Late Teachers
sīlādinā guṇagaṇena katūbhayatthā therāsabhā mama garū tidivaṃ supattā puññena nena pakatena samiddhacittā santiṃ bhavantu hadayassa sukhena pattā.

To Respected Elders/Teachers
Dhammena nena matisiddha mudācitena, buddhādi vatthu gata dhamma balena saddhiṃ, therāsabho ………. Yatinda nātho,

dīghāyuko bhavatu sādhu samiddha citto! dhammena nena matisiddha mudācitena, buddhādi vatthu gata dhamma balena saddhiṃ, therāsabhātha garugārava bhāvanīyā, dīghāyukā bhavatha sādhu samiddha cittā!

heading: Monday/ Wednesday
title: 18. Patthanā (Wholesome wishes)
content:
iminā puñña kammena mā me bāla samāgamo sataṃ samāgamo hotu yāva nibbāna pattiyā!!! (Three times)

idaṃ me puñña kammaṃ āsavakkhayā vahaṃ hotu!!! (Three times) sabba dukkhā pamuñcatu!

imāya dhammānu dhammapaṭipattiyā buddhaṃ pūjemi!

imāya dhammānu dhammapaṭipattiyā dhammaṃ pūjemi!

imāya dhammānu dhammapaṭipattiyā saṃghaṃ pūjemi!

addhā imāya paṭipattiyā jāti, jarā, vyādhi, maraṇamhā parimuccissāmī’ti!

heading: Monday/ Wednesday
title: 19. Khamāpana gāthā (Asking for forgiveness)
content:
kāyena vācā cittena pamādena mayā kataṃ accayaṃ khama me bhante bhūripañña tathāgata.

Kāyena vācā cittena pamādena mayā kataṃ accayaṃ khama me dhamma sandiṭṭhika akālika.

Kāyena vācā cittena pamādena mayā kataṃ accayaṃ khama me saṃgha puññakkhetta anuttara.

Sādhu! sādhu! sādhu!

heading: Tuesday/ Thursday
title: Preliminary Homage
content: Namo tassa bhagato arahato sammāsambuddhassa!

heading: Tuesday/ Thursday
title: 01. Ārādhanā (Invitation)
content:
yāvatā bhagavā loke - tiṭṭheyya tava sāsanaṃ;

tāvatā patigaṇhātu - pūjā lokānukampayā.

yāvatā bhagavā loke - tiṭṭheyya tava sāsanaṃ;

tāvatā patigaṇhātu - pūjā lokānukampayā.

heading: Tuesday/ Thursday
title: 02. Padīpa pūjā (Offering Oil Lamp)
content:
gandhatelappadittena - dīpena tama dhaṃsinā;

tileāka dīpaṃ sambuddhaṃ - pūjayāmī tamonudaṃ.

Sitthatelappa dittena - dīpena tama dhaṃsinā;

tileāka dīpaṃ sambuddhaṃ - pūjayāmī tamonudaṃ.

heading: Tuesday/ Thursday
title: 03. Gandha pūjā (Offering Fragrance)
content:
sugandhikāya vadanaṃ - ananta guṇagandhinaṃ;

sugandhināhaṃ gandhena - pūjayāmī tathāgataṃ.

heading: Tuesday/ Thursday
title: 04. Gandhodaka pūjā (Offering Drinking water)
content:
sugandhaṃ sītalaṃ kappaṃ - pasanna madhuraṃ subhaṃ;

pānīya metaṃ bhagavā - patigaṇhātu muttama.

heading: Tuesday/ Thursday
title: 05. Uṇhodaka pūjā (Warm Water)
content:
adhivāsetu neā bhante - uṇhodakaṃ parikappitaṃ;

anukampaṃ upādāya - patigaṇhātu muttama.

heading: Tuesday/ Thursday
title: 06. Pānaka pūjā (Offering Allowable Drinks)
content:
adhivāsetu no bhante- gilānapaccayaṃ imaṃ;

anukampaṃ upādāya - patigaṇhātu muttama.

heading: Tuesday/ Thursday
title: 07. Phuppa pūjā (Offering Flower)
content:
nirodha samāpattito vuṭṭhahitvā viya

nisinnaṃ bhagavantaṃ arahantaṃ sammāsambuddhaṃ

iminā pupphena pūjemi pūjemi pūjemi.

ayaṃ puppha pūjā buddha pacceka buddha

aggasāvaka mahāsāvaka arahantādīnaṃ sabhāvasīlaṃ

ahampi tesaṃ anuvattako homi.

Idaṃ pupphaṃ idāni vaṇṇenapi suvaṇṇaṃ

gandhenapi sugandhaṃ

saṇṭhāṇenapi susaṇṭhānaṃ

khippameva dubbaṇṇaṃ duggandhaṃ dussaṇṭhānaṃ aniccataṃ pāpuṇissati

evameva kho sabbe saṃkhārā aniccā

sabbe saṃkhārā dukkhā

sabbe dhammā anattāti.

heading: Tuesday/ Thursday
title: 08. Homage to the Buddha
content:
itipi so bhagavā arahaṃ sammāsambuddho vijjācaraṇasampanno sugato lokavidū anuttaro purisadammasārathi satthā devamanussānaṃ buddho bhagavā ti.

Buddhaṃ jīvita pariyantaṃ saraṇaṃ gacchāmi.

Ye ca buddhā atītā ca - ye ca buddhā anāgatā paccuppannā ca ye buddhā - ahaṃ vandāmi sabbadā.

Natthi me saraṇaṃ aññaṃ - buddho me saraṇaṃ varaṃ etena sacca vajjena - hotu me jayamaṃgalaṃ.

Uttamaṃgena vandehaṃ - pāda paṃsu varuttamaṃ buddhe yo khalito doso - buddho khamatu taṃ mamaṃ.

heading: Tuesday/ Thursday
title: 09. Homage to the Dhamma
content:
Svākkhāto bhagavatā dhammo sandiṭṭhiko akāliko ehipassiko opanayiko paccattaṃ veditabbo viññūhī ti.

Dhammaṃ jīvita pariyantaṃ saraṇaṃ gacchāmi. ye ca dhammā atītā ca ye ca dhammā anāgatā

paccuppannā ca ye dhammā - ahaṃ vandāmi sabbadā

natthi me saraṇaṃ aññaṃ - dhammo me saraṇaṃ varaṃ etena sacca vajjena - hotu me jayamaṃgalaṃ

uttamaṃgena vandehaṃ - dhammaṃ ca tividhaṃ varaṃ

dhamme yo khalito doso - dhammo khamatu taṃ mamaṃ.

heading: Tuesday/ Thursday
title: 10. Homage to the Saṅgha
content:
Supaṭipanno bhagavato sāvakasaṅgho ujupaṭipanno bhagavato sāvakasaṅgho ñāyapaṭipanno bhagavato sāvakasaṅgho sāmīcipaṭipanno bhagavato sāvakasaṅgho yadidaṃ cattāri purisayugāni aṭṭha purisapuggalā esa bhagavato sāvakasaṅgho āhuneyyo pāhuneyyo dakkhiṇeyyo añjalikaraṇīyo anuttaraṃ puññakkhettaṃ lokassā’ti.

Saṅghaṃ jīvita pariyantaṃ saraṇaṃ gacchāmi. ye ca saṅghā atītā ca ye ca saṅghā anāgatā

paccuppannā ca ye saṅghā - ahaṃ vandāmi sabbadā

natthi me saraṇaṃ aññaṃ - saṅgho me saraṇaṃ varaṃ etena sacca vajjena - hotu me jayamaṃgalaṃ.

Uttamaṃgena vandehaṃ - saṅghaṃ ca tividhottamaṃ saṃghe yo khalito doso - saṅgho khamatu taṃ mamaṃ.

heading: Tuesday/ Thursday
title: 11. Aṭṭhārasa āvenika buddhaguṇa:
content:
Atītaṃse buddhassa bhagavato appaṭihataṃ ñāṇaṃ

anāgataṃse buddhassa bhagavato appaṭihataṃ ñāṇaṃ
paccuppannaṃse buddhassa bhagavato appaṭihataṃ ñāṇaṃ
imehi tīhi dhammehi samannāgatassa buddhassa bhagavato

Sabbaṃ kāyakammaṃ ñāṇa pubbaṅgamaṃ ñāṇānuparivattaṃ

sabbaṃ vacīkammaṃ ñāṇa pubbaṅgamaṃ ñāṇānuparivattaṃ

sabbaṃ manokammaṃ ñāṇa pubbaṅgamaṃ ñāṇānuparivattaṃ

imehi chahi dhammehi samannāgatassa buddhassa bhagavato

Natthi chandassa hāni

natthi dhammadesanāya hāni

natthi viriyassa hāni

natthi samādhissa hāni

natthi paññāya hāni

natthi vimuttiyā hāni.

imehi dvādasahi dhammehi samannāgatassa buddhassa bhagavato

Natthi davā, natthi ravā

natthi apphuṭaṃ natthi vegāyitattaṃ

natthi abyāvaṭa mano, natthi appaṭisaṃkhānupekkhā.

imehi aṭṭhārasahi dhammehi samannāgataṃ

sammā sambuddhaṃ bhagavantaṃ sirasā namāmi.

heading: Tuesday/ Thursday
title: 12. Catu Saṅvejanīyaṭṭhāna
content:
Māyā suto sugata sākiya sīhanātho – jātakkhaṇe sapadasā vabhisaṅkamitvā;

yasmiṃ udīrayi giraṃ varalumbiṇimhi –

taṃ jāta cetiyamahaṃ sirasā namāmi.

Yasmiṃ nisajja vajirāsana bandhanena – jetvā savāsana kilesa balaṃ munindo;

sambodhi ñāṇamavagamma vihāsi sammā – taṃ bodhi cetiyamahaṃ sirasā namāmi.

Saṅkampayaṃ dasasahassiya loka dhātuṃ - desesi yatra bhagavā vara dhamma cakkaṃ;

barāṇasīpura samīpa vane migānaṃ - taṃ dhamma cetiyamahaṃ sirasā namāmi.

Katvāna loka hitamatta hitañca nātho – āsītikova upavattana kānanamhi;

yasmiṃ nipajja gatavā nirupādhisesaṃ - nibbāna cetiyamahaṃ sirasā namāmi.

heading: Tuesday/ Thursday
title: 13. Cetiya-vandanā (Worshipping pagodas, etc.):
content: vandāmi cetiyaṃ sabbaṃ - sabbaṭhānesu patiṭṭhitaṃ sārīrika dhātu mahā bodhiṃ - buddharūpaṃ sakalaṃ sadā.

heading: Tuesday/ Thursday
title: 14. Paritta Chanting & Devārādhanā
content:
Invitation to celestial beings for listening Dhamma

  1. Sagge kāme ca rūpe giri sikhara taṭe
    cāntalikkhe vimāne
    dīpe raṭṭhe ca gāme taru vana gahaṇe
    geha vatthumhi khette
    bhummā cāyantu devā jalatala visame
    yakkha gandhabba nāgā
    tiṭṭhantā santikedaṃ munivara vacanaṃ
    sādhavo me suṇantu.

  2. Samantā cakkavāḷesu atrāgacchantu devatā Saddhammaṃ munirājassa suṇantu saggamokkhadaṃ.

Dhammassavanakālo ayaṃ bhadantā.

Dhammassavanakālo ayaṃ bhadantā.

Parittadhammassavanakālo ayaṃ bhadantā.

i. Metta suttaṃ

ii. Vatta pirita (one sutta from two bhānavāra)

iii. Mora paritta – (second half)

apetayaṃ cakkhumā ekarājā…….

iv. Khandha paritta - second half

Virūpakkhehi me mettaṃ mettaṃ erāpatehi me…………

v. Āṭānāṭiya gāthā

vipassissa namatthu - cakkhumantassa sirīmato,

sikhissapi namatthu - sabba bhūtānukampino

vessabhussa namatthu - nahātakassa tapassino, namatthu kakusandhassa - mārasenā pamaddino, koṇāgamanassa namatthu - brāhmaṇassa vusīmato,

kassapassa namatthu - vippamuttassa sabbadhi,

aṃgīrasassa namatthu - sakyaputtassa sirīmato,

namo tesaṃ sattannaṃ - sammāsambuddhānanti.

heading: Tuesday/ Thursday
title: 15. Sugatovāda (the Buddha’s Daily Admonishment)
content:
Appamādena bhikkhave sampādetha, dullabho buddhuppādo lokasmiṃ,

dullabho manussatta paṭilābho, dullabhā khaṇa sampatti, dullabhā pabbajjā,

dullabhaṃ saddhamma savanaṃ,

dullabho sappurisa saṃsevo,

ārabhatha nikkhamatha yuñjatha buddha sāsane, dhunātha maccuno senaṃ naḷāgāraṃva kuñjaro.

Yo imasmiṃ dhamma vinaye appamatto vihessati, pahāya jāti saṃsāraṃ dukkhassantaṃ karissati.

heading: Tuesday/ Thursday
title: 16. Bhāvanā (Meditation time)
content: (Meditation period)
